meaning: n.(尤指国际性或全国性的)少年团体大会,喧闹的娱乐会,狂欢活动
examples: What do you bring to the jamboree, darling, huh? Aside from those baby blues and a knife?
But this week's jamboree suggests the true headquarters of African.
Europe's leaders plan a jamboree in Berlin that will issue a portentous declaration.
The Lincoln Jamboree--named for Hodgenville native Abraham Lincoln--is, despite its somewhat cornpone vibe, professional.
This once-a-month "tribute" section is just a small part of the weekly three-hour Jamboree.
